combust.def: 燃燒、消耗、燒起來的人的人
combust.ex: The ancient material began to combust rapidly.

combustible.def: 易燃的、可燃物的人物 (單數)
combustible.ex: The warehouse was full of highly combustible oil.

combustion.def: 燃燒、氧化、騷動的人物 (單數)
combustion.ex: Modern cars use an internal combustion engine.

come.def: 來、到達、發生、變成的人的人的人物
come.col: come true, come along, come up, come what may
come.ex: I hope your wildest dreams will come true today.

comeback.def: 東山再起、回擊、反駁人物 (單數)
comeback.ex: The aging singer is planning to make a comeback.

comedian.def: 喜劇演員、滑稽的人人物 (單數)
comedian.ex: The stand-up comedian made everyone laugh tonight.

comedienne.ex: She is a very famed and funny local comedienne.

comedy.col: romantic comedy, black comedy, situational comedy (sitcom)
comedy.ex: I prefer watching a light romantic comedy tonight.

comely.def: 眉清目秀的、動人的人的人物 (美)
comely.ex: The princess had a very comely and kind face.

comer.def: 來者、有成功希望的人的人物 (單數)
comer.ex: The race is open to all comers from local town.

comestible.def: 可吃的、食物的人物 (單數)
comestible.ex: They sold a lot of fine and tasty comestibles.

comet.ex: Halley's comet passes by our earth every 76 years.

come-uppance.def: 應得的懲罰、報應人物 (單數)
come-uppance.ex: He finally got his come-uppance for his crimes.

comfort.def: 舒適、安慰、慰藉的人的人的人物
comfort.col: creature comforts, comfort zone, cold comfort (微補償)
comfort.ex: She tried to offer him some words of comfort tonight.

comfortable.ex: The new chair is very big and comfortable tonight.

comfortably.ex: He settled comfortably into his favorite chair.

comforter.def: 安慰者、鴨絨被、圍巾人物 (單數)
comforter.ex: She slept under a thick warm comforter tonight.

comforting.def: 安慰的、令人欣慰的人 (或物)
comforting.ex: It was a comforting thought to know he was safe.

comic.def: 滑稽的、喜劇的人物 (單數)
comic.col: comic strip, comic book, comic relief
comic.ex: I like reading the daily comic strip in paper.
